# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: mesh-ingress-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80
        name: http
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
        - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: ingress-http-routing
  namespace: default
spec:
  gateways:
    - istio-system/mesh-ingress-gateway
  hosts:
    - "*"
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /service-a
      rewrite:
        uri: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 80
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /service-b
      rewrite:
        uri: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 80
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /service-c
      rewrite:
        uri: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: service-c.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 80
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: default-backend.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 80
